PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^xFFFF77^7********************************* ^xFFFF77^7^xFFFF77Should you play this build?^xFFFF77 ^7^xFFFF77^7******************************************
^x70FF70Pros:^7 -High damage early(designed to run sanctum as Early as possible) -Targeted strategy to push wealth early which allows snowballing upgrades -Scales well with every upgrade can make sizable gains
^xE05030Cons:^7 -Very SQUISHY early, this is designed for Sanctum, DO NOT play if planning to go into maps unless you have an idea of respecs to do for specifically mapping. -Late Game Crazy special new enchants in the mechanic probably won't work with energy blade(tested with current enchants and currently the enchants disappear on activated energy blade
^xFFFF77KEY NOTE^7: This build is for sanctum rush into tri-stack swap which does the rest of the game. (NOT RECOMMENDED for mapping start)
********************************* ^xFFFF77Skill Gem Setups to Try on build ^7******************************************
^x8888FFPenance brand of dissipation^7 is the best for sanctum(very good damage, can dodge mechanics with full dps uptime, ideal for sanctum) (BUY This off trade, do not try and self farm it)
Other skills will work like basic firestorm or frostbolt ice nova ect, but I would highly recommend penance for ideal sanctum pushing.
^x70FF70IMPORTANT^7: Quality on Energy blade = 10% more es(10% more damage), with enhance =20% more es/damage, prioritize quality on this first, then other gems(IE if lab font gives you good quality then put it on EB)
********************************* ^xFFFF77Leveling ^7******************************************
^x70FF70Scuffed Leveling Vod The first 3 acts:^7 https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2201777301?t=08h21m39s ^x70FF70Scuffed Leveling Vod Finishing Campaign/PreppingCurrencyForEarlySanctumGear:^7^7 https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2202754844?t=00h13m10s
Vendor Regex(use in act 1/2): b-b-b|b-b|r-b|b-r|g-r|r-g|nne|rint
^x70FF70This tree^7 is setup for generic fire spell hit based leveling with 10 or less respecs in order to full swap into tree for the first sanctum.
^x70FF70First Lab = Battlemage:^7 Prioritize high flat damage weapon in mainhand(sword or axe that you id with high flat damage(upgrade as you find better weapons while leveling)
^x70FF70Damage Skills: ^7Level as ^x7070FFMagma Orb ^7+^x7070FF Combustion^7 + ^x7070FFEle Prolif^7 Until you get arma brand OR firestorm(firestorm easier but bit slower clear & similar damage) + cremation (good links to use are ^x8888FFimmolate^7/^x8888FFcombustion^7/^x8888FFfaster casting^7/^7^x7070FFunleash(firestorm only)^7/^x7070FFconc^7/^xE05030cruelty^7/^x70FF70Greater multiple Proj^7 OR ^x7070FFPinpoint^7(cremation only)) ^7 IF brand + arma then get ^x70FF70Desecrate^7 + ^x7070FFBrand Recall^7 from act 2(cruelty is great support reward from silk
^x70FF70Movement Skills:^7 ^xE05030(Leap Slam OR Shield Charge)+ ^x70FF70momentum^7(mule a ranger)/^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7(do siosa for this or wait till act 6) + ^x7070FFFrostblink^7/^x7070FFFlamedash^7
^x70FF70Aura Skills:^7 ^x7070FFPurity of Elements/^x70FF70Haste^7^7 + ^xE05030^7(^x7070FFClarity^7^7 or ^x70FF70Arctic Armour^7) while leveling Then swap auras based on what stage of the POB
^x70FF70Curse:^xE05030 Punishment^7
^x70FF70Bandits: ^7Help Alira(15 all ele res less gear pressure) OR Oak(40 life, harder to res cap, better late game scaling) //// 8% movespeed is decent but i think leap slam is ideal and less dependent on movespeed
^x7070FF^x70FF70Buy Gems from lily(act 6) to Level in offhand:^7^7 ^x7070FFSpellblade support x 1 ^7/ ^xE05030^x7070FFCrit Damage^7 /^x7070FF increased Crit Strike ^7/ ^x7070FFAssassin's Mark^7 / ^x7070FFDiscipline^7 / As soon as you can buy ^x7070FFPenance of dissipation^7, buy to level in offhand
********************************* ^xFFFF77How To Get First Easy Chaos to Buy Early Gear Items for Sanctum ^7******************************************
Pick up rogue markers/demo contracts throughout campaign
Starting at lvl 60 check vendor in heist for demolition contracts(these specifically drop chaos alot from the '?' Side chests
The vendor will reset every level
5-10 missions should net 10-20c which you will use to buy the key items first ^x70FF70^7 ********************************* ^xFFFF77Gearing ^7******************************************
^x70FF70Better Trading Buy Folder: ^7be sure to highlight the whole text or import can fail ^7 
OMEGA Early^7 SSF id rares till you get currency then start purchasing some of the recommended early uniques(keep an eye out for good flat damage one hand weapons for battlemage)
^x70FF70EARLY^7 ^xAF6025^71st Ring:^7 ^xAF6025Lori's Lantern^7^7 Decent res + movespeed + Damage unlucky solid defensive(very strong for price, only need one of these) 2nd Ring: ^xFFFF77Rare ^7Life/Es + Res ideally it should be better than second loris stat wise(unlucky is big part of reason to do lori's) ^xAF6025^7Helmet:^7 ^xAF6025Malachai's Simula ^720% double dam, gets us Bloodmagic early ^7Body armour: ^xAF6025Ghostwrithe^7 allows us to go Energyblade because very good ES scaling on low gear power Amulet: ^xAF6025Carnage Heart ^7or Mediocre ^xFFFF77Rare amulet^7 will do Boots: ^xFFFF77Rare^7 with life/res/movespeed -> ^xAF6025Kaom's Roots^7(these boots are no longed mandatory as we can technically now run the new stun mastery but I still like them, up to you) Gloves: ^xAF6025Kalisa's Grace^7(use for self cast 5L) Belt: ^xFFFF77Rare^7 with strength + res/life(ideal base is heavy) Shield: ^xFFFF77Rare^7 ES shield ideally titanium with decent ES Main hand weapon:(any one hand weapon like sword/axe with decent base attack speed(relevant for boss death ball phases where you can turn off e-blade and still leap slam around)) ^x70FF70 Mid-Game^7(swapped to Tri-stack) Rings: Good rare, use the trade search & get fairly high attribute/chaos res Amulet: ^xAF6025Astramentis ^7Helmet:^7 ^xAF6025Curtain Call ^7Belt: ^xAF6025Cyclopean Coil^7 Boots: ^xFFFF77Rare^7 (high attribute + life + movespeed + chaos res) Body armour: ^xAF6025Ivory Tower^7(REQUIRES Balbala SetUP) Shield: ^xAF6025Rathpith^7 Gloves: ^xAF6025Shaper's Touch^7 Weapon: one hand weapon with abyss socket
^x70FF70End-game^7 Rings: ^xFFFF77Rare Helical(harder to craft but can save with recombine sometimes)^7 Fractured t1 Int/Str -> attribut catalyst -> essence of scorn till t1 int or str -> suffixes can't be changed veild chaos Amulet: ^xAF6025^7^xFFFF77Simplex Amulet ^7with Awakener orbed %str + %attr -> anul benchcraft life on prefix(or veiled chaos) / OR do a three-rat / OR gigachad ^xAF6025eyes of greatwolf ^7(check costs of various options, fairly comparable in power) ^7Helmet:^7 ^xAF6025Curtain Call ^7Belt: ^xAF6025Cyclopian Coil ^7Max Roll with %attribute corruption & quality Boots: ^xFFFF77Rare^7 fracture t1 Str/Int + Fundamental/Sanctified/Hollow Fossil combo till T1 str/int + abyss socket -> suffix can't veiled chaos + block slam Body armour: ^xAF6025Ivory Tower^7 Shield: ^xAF6025Rathpith^7 Gloves: ^xAF6025Shaper's Touch^7 Weapon: one hand weapon with abyss socket
^x70FF70JEWELS To Look for:^7 ^xFFFF77Rare Jewels^7: %life/%es/Str&int/All attribute/Crit multi ^xAF6025Adorned^7: this jewel is probably still BiS in late game BUT requires a very good roll and basically perfectly divined magic jewels(only for very min-max IMO) ^xAF6025Emperor's Mastery^7: Best jewel the build can get but very expesive and not necessary ^xAF6025Life Grand Spectrums^7: Solid options but quite expensive and only marginally better than good rare jewels ^xAF6025Split Personality^7: Str + Int / Str +Dex / Int+Dex (use whichever combination helps balance attributes the best, likely combinations with dex(depends on attribute on gear) ^xAF6025Watchers Eye^7: Evade% /%suppress / spell block / regen / recovery / gain on hit / ect good with discipline
********************************* ^xFFFF77Mana ^7****************************************** ^x70FF70 Mana Solutions to aim for early: ^715% skill cost as mana as first life mastery + clarity OR by act 4 lvl38 put the 50% reservation on eternal blessing and just have a full mana pool. Regardless need to combine with mana flask throughout acts. ^x70FF70Mana Solutions to aim for in later setups:^7 Late game solution -> blood magic + eternal youth (sometimes life recharge turns off in predicitive mod, this is a bug with internet, swap to lockstep should help avoid this)
^xE05030Eternal Youth DOWNSIDE^7: There are a select few mechanics in poe that turn off recovery, Exarch ground(i think not 100% sure)/Sirus Ground/Maven Degen beam if you get hit by or stand in one of these the life recharge will be deactivated for 2+ seconds thus softlocking skill use for a bit. Simply Avoid Sirus/exarch Ground mod on T17s & you have to play around those mechanics in ubers, very doable(sirus is the only real problematic one imo)
********************************* ^xFFFF77Eternal Youth BUG ^7******************************************
sometimes life recharge turns off in predicitive mod, this is a bug with internet, swap to lockstep should help avoid this but it happens on occasion to people based on what people have told me, I've run into this issue a few times but its very rare and generally for most people predictive fixes the issue
********************************* ^xFFFF77Snacks ^7******************************************
^x70FF70S-Tier:^7 Water(only drink you will ever need) Cheeze itz are goated S tier snack Doughnuts(best snacking desert there is) Eggs -> scrambled/omelet/breakfast sandwich combo, always good no matter how you make em
^x70FF70A-Tier:^7 Cereal -> time efficient breakfast to get gaming faster(i recommend granola) Dino Nuggies(fairly time efficient, we can pretend its meal) (pair with mac-cheese) Frozen Pizza(fairly time efficient also kindof technically a meal) Taquitos(idk how good these are, but chat seems to love and won't shut up about it) Mac-Cheese = Easy/Time Efficient we can pretend this is almost a meal (pair with dino nuggies) Club Crackers solid snack easy and affordable Gold fish (i'd put this in S-tier if my babies had more control of this list) Oreos/Preffered Cookie + Milk (pretty min-max for taste value but does require setup of milk & oreos -1 minute efficiency) Milk/Protein Shake-> delicious/filling -> requires a blender Peanuts the most notable nut there is, personally i like honey roasted but you do you Potatoes -> great build diversity, can min-max into basically any meal (do not consume raw)
^x70FF70B-Tier:^7 Asiago Bagels + cream cheese (decently time efficient but mid risk of cream cheesing your keyboard) Ice Cream(bit less time efficient but tastes amazing, i recommend peanut butter + vanilla ice cream + dark choco chips that you keep in freezer) Fruit snacks (easy & convenient) but will screw your teeth Smoothie(dealers choice of ingredients) decent setup time, not a tasty as a shake probably healthier Pretzels maximize water efficiency and help you pretend you aren't starving from lack of real food (add in whipped creamed cheese and it goes to A-tier) Cashews Delicious and a bit more cost efficient than pistachios Tea bit of setup time with boiling water but fantastically soothing Chipotle -> delicious but super costly if you pay to deliver OR you brick your time efficiency by going to store Eggo Waffles -> pretty solid time efficiency, charlotte loves these Quesadilla -> cost efficient & easy to make solid flavor Chips & Salsa (not my thing but a staple classic for many, just don't spill the salsa) +add guac for 10 points of flavor but -10 in time it takes to mash up the avocado Oatmeal -> pretty filling, results in high end gaming, not BiS flavour but gets the job done
^x70FF70C-Tier:^7 Hotdogs Fairly time efficient, quality will vary greatly depending on what dogs you get and how you cook them (F tier= microwave, A tier if grilled with high quality dogs) Pistachios super tasty but kinda p2w nut Honey Buns -> tasty unhealthy fast & you will need to wash hands Beef Jerky (mid taste in my opinion but if thats your thing it could jump up some tiers due to time efficiency/ease) Gummy Bears -> solid but will get stuck to teeth which feels bad Grilled Cheese Decent time consumption, high flavor, can vary greatly on how its made
^x70FF70D-Tier:^7 Hot-Pocket(time efficient, seem way worse than I remember)(will probably burn your tongue) Cheetos/Doritos => tasty snakc but finger debuff will destroy your keyboard/efficiency Reese's -> RIP teeth Skittles -> RIP teeth Star Burst -> RIP teeth
^x70FF70F-Tier:^7 Popcorn -> thing will get stuck in teeth, GG - multiple hours due to pure tilt and efficiency loss Every other drink known to mankind (bud light) raisins -> just a creeper version of a grape BabyCarrots/Cucumbers w/ humus(too healthy, almost like you know what the sun looks like) Poptarts super time efficient but you will feel dirty on the inside eating them & they kinda suck now Apples Pokimane Cookies(you disappoint me) Door-Dash -> giga expensive, could have gotten a new pc
********************************* ^xFFFF77The End ^7******************************************

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Brutal Restraint Timeless Jewel League: Legion Variant: Asenath (Dance with Death) Variant: Deshret (Wind Dancer) (Pre 3.11.0) Variant: Nasima (Second Sight) Variant: Balbala (The Traitor) Selected Variant: 4 LevelReq: 20 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}{range:0.5}Denoted service of (500-8000) dekhara in the akhara of Asenath {variant:2}{range:0.5}Denoted service of (500-8000) dekhara in the akhara of Deshret {variant:3}{range:0.5}Denoted service of (500-8000) dekhara in the akhara of Nasima {variant:4}{range:0.5}Denoted service of (500-8000) dekhara in the akhara of Balbala Passives in radius are Conquered by the Maraketh Historic

Rarity: UNIQUE Astramentis Onyx Amulet Unique ID: e5209560a1e4200308f1a7204e84d33796620f416241d90d4e7192f03632d562 Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Utmost Swiftness +19 to all Attributes +116 to all Attributes -4 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits

Rarity: UNIQUE Curtain Call Plague Mask Evasion: 31 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.2222 Energy Shield: 8 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.3333 Unique ID: 543e4a03b120503e413c9aa8198443b8ca21f9abd14f0151eb29fc970cf8dcca Item Level: 80 Quality: 0 Sockets: R-B-B-G LevelReq: 10 Implicits: 1 Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier +23 to maximum Life 14% reduced Mine Throwing Speed Mines have 40% increased Detonation Speed Skills which throw Mines throw up to 1 additional Mine if you have at least 800 Dexterity Skills which throw Mines throw up to 1 additional Mine if you have at least 800 Intelligence Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Shaper's Touch Crusader Gloves Armour: 251 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7347 Energy Shield: 50 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.5793 Unique ID: ea553dced0351949023273e24e97c9546ef9b4343adfa4a438cc37989dbb858b Shaper Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 0 Sockets: G-B-B-R LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 1 Curse Enemies with Despair on Hit 87% increased Armour and Energy Shield +4 Accuracy Rating per 2 Intelligence +1 Life per 4 Dexterity +1 Mana per 4 Strength 1% increased Energy Shield per 10 Strength 2% increased Evasion Rating per 10 Intelligence 2% increased Melee Physical Damage per 10 Dexterity Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Cyclopean Coil Leather Belt Unique ID: 857b528f0fe4746b7a7780a3afeab05d8ffa5e11b76d5236b42e0b93ce27ed5f Elder Item Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 1 +34 to maximum Life 18% increased Attributes +65 to maximum Life Cannot be Frozen if Dexterity is higher than Intelligence Cannot be Ignited if Strength is higher than Dexterity Cannot be Shocked if Intelligence is higher than Strength 1% increased Damage per 5 of your lowest Attribute
